name: Strange Chatroom Website
description:
Whilst browsing the web, you stumble upon a stranger chatting website, ChatLinker.com- similar to Omegle. As the day grows to night, you decide to hop on to pass the time.

Just thought about this on a whim. Not necessarily a horror bot, but it very well can be.

The link above just leads to a domain selling page incase you are wondering
creator: e!
